speaker: Civilian
en: [whistle] Didn't see that coming. Well, donât let me stop you.

vi: [Laughs] Nobody's ever really out. You know that, right?

en: You never actually planned to pack it in tonight, did you?
vi: You never actually planned to pack it in tonight, did you?

en: Um... okay then. You can have a look.

en: Some people have no shame. Hope you catch them.

speaker: Webb Staff
en: Oh, Fiona... have you met Bertie, our safety inspector?
vi: Oh, Fiona... have you met Bertie, our safety inspector?

en: The man just ordered round desks for everyone because he doesn't trust sharp corners.
vi: The man just ordered round desks for everyone because he doesn't trust sharp corners.

speaker: Webb Staff
en: I assure you, if Bertie signed off on it, it is probably good for your health.
vi: I assure you, if Bertie signed off on it, it is probably good for your health.

speaker: Webb Staff
en: This degaussing process... is it entirely safe?
vi: This degaussing process... is it entirely safe?

speaker: Webb Staff
en: Don't worry, we maintain a complete backup at the Webb R&D facility. Nothing gets lost. Now, if there's nothing else...
vi: Don't worry, we maintain a complete backup at the Webb R&D facility. Nothing gets lost. Now, if there's nothing else...

speaker: Webb Staff
en: What happens to the deleted files?
vi: What happens to the deleted files?

speaker: Webb Staff
en: If you are approached by the police, you tell them that you are not allowed to discuss sensitive company matters
vi: If you are approached by the police, you tell them that you are not allowed to discuss sensitive company matters

en: and refer them to our most excellent legal department.

en: By the time they dig themselves out from under the mountain of red tape

speaker: Webb Staff
en: that Roger Finch and his team is preparing to unceremoniously dump on them,
vi: that Roger Finch and his team is preparing to unceremoniously dump on them,

en: this unfortunate misunderstanding will be a thing of the past.

vi: What do we tell the police?

en: If you must know, we have fallen victim to a sophisticated and malicious smear campaign.
vi: If you must know, we have fallen victim to a sophisticated and malicious smear campaign.

en: Some rather impressive deep fakes have been leaked to the authorities by an as yet unnamed competitor.
vi: Some rather impressive deep fakes have been leaked to the authorities by an as yet unnamed competitor.

en: This farce will soon be cleared up but management fears that in the meantime,

en: the police may insist on taking possession of certain servers, thus endangering the integrity of classified research.

vi: Better to conduct due diligence, wouldn't you agree?

en: I can sure as hell try.
